Class CustomItemStack

    • create

      @Deprecated(forRemoval=true) public static org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack create(org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack itemStack, org.bukkit.Material type)
      Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
      Setting the type via ItemStack.setType(Material) will not be supported soon.
      Clones the item stack and sets its type
      Parameters:
      itemStack - The item
      type - The new type
      Returns:
      Returns the item with a new type
